keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY SLEEP. Sleep, yawning : Ant-t., Caust., Cina., Croc., Hep., Ign., Kre., Lyc., Mang., Nux-v., Op., Pho., Plat., Pul., Rhus-t. Sleep, yawning, incomplete : Lach., Lyc. Sleep, yawning, violent : Hep., Ign., Plat., Rhus-t. Sleep, yawning, and stretching : Cham., Nux-v., Rhus-t. Sleep, sleepiness (by day) : Aeth., Ant-c., Ant-t., Bapt., Calc-c., Chel., Croc., Fer-p., Gels., Nux-m., Nux-v., Op., Pho-ac., Pul., Sul. Sleep, sleepiness, yet sleepless at night : Pul., Sul. Sleep, sleepiness, morning : Calc-c., Con., Grap., Nux-v., Sep. Sleep, sleepiness, forenoon : Ant-c., Saba. Sleep, sleepiness, afternoon : Chin., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sul. Sleep, sleepiness, evening : Ars., Calc-c., Kali-c., Nux-v. Sleep, sleepiness, accompanied by : Ant-t., Nux-m., Pul. Sleep, sleepiness, caused by other complaints : Ant-t., Nux-m., Op., Rhus-t., Ver-a. Sleep, sleepiness, eating on : Chin., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sul. Sleep , anxious : Aco., Ars. Sleep, care, worry, agg. : Calc-c. Sleep, coma vigil : Aco., Op. Sleep, comatose : Croc., Nux-v., Op., Pul., Ver-a. Sleep, light : Cof., Op., Sele., Sul. Sleep, restless, tossing about, etc. : Aco., Ars., Bar-c., Bell., Chin., Pul., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul. Sleep, stupid, deep, etc. : Aeth., Ant-t., Bapt., Bell., Con., Led., Nux-m., Op. Sleep, unrefreshing, awakes tired, etc. : Bry., Chin., Con., Hep., Op., Sul. Sleep, lying on back : Bry., Pul., Rhus-t., Stram. Sleep, with hands over head : Lac-c., Nux-v., Pul. Sleep, strange positions in : Cina., Plb. Sleep, during, nightmare : Aco., Nux-v., Op., Sul. Sleep, chews and swallows : Cina., Ign. Sleep, saliva, flow of : Lach., Merc., Pho., Rhus-t. Sleep, shrieks, screams, etc. : Ap., Cina., Ign., Zin. Sleep, snoring : Op. Sleep, somnambulism : Dict., Pho. Sleep, starting up, jerks, etc. : Aco., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Cham., Cina., Ign., Lyc., Pul., Sep., Sil., Stram., Zin. Sleep, talking : Lach., Pul. Sleep, waking , frequently, cat-naps : Calc-c., Hep., Pho., Pul., Sep., Sul. Sleep, waking, too early : Kali-c., Nat-c., Nux-v., Ran-b. Sleep, waking, late : Calc-c., Grap., Nux-v., Sep. Sleep, waking, anger, in : Cham., Lyc. Sleep, waking, confusion, in : Chin. Sleep, waking, fright, nightmare, etc., in (Comp. Mind, waking.) : Bell., Bor., Cina., Hyo., Ign., Lach., Nat-m., Sil., Stram., Sul., Thu., Zin. Sleep, waking, jerk, with a : Bell. Sleep, sleeplessness : Aco., Ars., Bell., Calc-c., Cham., Cocc., Cof., Hyo., Kali-c., Lach., Merc., Nux-v., Op., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Sul. Sleep, sleeplessness, early (late falling asleep) : Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Carb-v., Chin., Grap., Merc., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Sleep, sleeplessness, late (after midnight) : Caps., Cof., Kali-c., Nux-v., Sil. Sleep, sleeplessness, although sleepy : Ap., Bell., Cham., Hep., Op., Pho., Pul., Sep. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by : Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Cham., Chin., Cof., Merc., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, idea fixed : Calc-c., Grap., Pul. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, once awaking, on : Nat-m. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, nervousness : Aco., Chin., Cof., Gels., Hyo., Lach., Lyc., Mos., Nux-v., Plat. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, restlessness : Aco., Ars., Cham. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, rush of ideas : Calc-c., Cof., Gels., Hyo., Ign., Nux-v., Op., Pul. Sleep, sleeplessness, caused by, twitchings : Ars., Bell., Ign., Sul. Sleep, dreams : Am-m., Arn., Ars., Bry., Calc-c., Chin., Grap., Lach., Lyc., Mag-c., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul., Thu. Sleep, dreams, agreeable : Calc-c., Nat-c., Nux-v., Op., Pul., Sep., Stap., Vio-od. Sleep, dreams, of day's work, difficulties, etc. : Bry., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t. Sleep, dreams, dead, of the : Ars., Mag-c., Pho., Thu. Sleep, dreams, falling : Thu. Sleep, dreams, vivid, fire, etc. : Cann., Hyo., Pho., Pul., Rhus-t., Sil., Sul. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
